reviews.review_title: THE ESCAPE GAME OF THE 7TH ART!
reviews.review_description: Cinescape VR is a creative and immersive puzzle adventure. The unique object transformation mechanic adds a fresh twist, and the cinematic atmosphere makes the experience truly engaging. A great VR story-driven experience.

Forcing the use of hand tracking is just the first of many problems with this game. From clunky mechanics, a piss poor tutorial and a story that just doesn't engage, anything good seems to be buried under rubble. 

Early reviews from YouTube monkeys and bloggers made this sound engaging and fun, instead those early impressions show that anyone is willing to take a payout to lie about quality. 

The fact that the game shadow dropped shows the developer has little confidence in this game and now playing it, it's pretty obvious why. 

When this finally launches on psvr2 I expect the reception will be even worse than it is here. 


At least the graphics aren't trash

developer_response.body:
Hi, 
A new version with Controller support is out! You can download it.
Best regards

reviews.review_description: Excellent mix of Card battle puzzles with escape-room style puzzles. enjoyed playing it. Support on Discord is excellent. Recommended highly
